en: Ignition prevention measures must protect stored flammable or explosive materials.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 20(2), 20(7), 47
Controls must prevent heavier-than-air vapors from accumulating in low areas.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 20(4)

Flammable waste removal practices must include collection and removal at least once per shift. Flammable waste quantities must be kept to a minimum to reduce the risk of major fires or rapid fire spread.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 44(1)

Fire extinguisher and extinguishing system inspections must occur at least every two years with records maintained. Extinguishing agent quantity checks must occur at least every six months.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 45(8)
Fire Equipment Inspections (Every 6 Months, Every 2 Years)
